name: Crown Princess
tagline: Nearly 900 balconies. A three-storey Piazza. A whole lot of sea air.
summary: Crown Princess is a 113,561-tonne floating town with a Riviera-style atrium, top-deck poolside cinema and almost a thousand balcony rooms. She sailed her first cruise in 2006 with Martha Stewart as her godmother, and across 19 decks carries up to 3,080 guests looked after by a crew of 1,200. Nana and Poppa are aboard for a 116-day voyage from 6 May 2026 to 29 August 2026.

images.alt: Crown Princess at sea — the whole ship
A live performance in the three-storey Piazza atrium
A production show in the Princess Theater, performers on stage in fog
Movies Under the Stars on the top deck — popcorn and a giant screen
Guests on the dance floor with an instructor at night
Kids playing mini-golf on the top deck putting green
Family splash zone — pool and water play
Kids on the top-deck stairs eating ice-cream cones
Pasta course at Sabatini's Italian Trattoria

highlights.title: The Piazza
highlights.body: A three-storey atrium at the heart of the ship — gourmet coffees, street performers, glass lifts, a spiral staircase and live music drifting up from below.

highlights.title: Movies Under the Stars
highlights.body: Top-deck open-air cinema with loungers, fleece blankets and complimentary popcorn. Films, concerts and live sport on a giant LED screen.

highlights.title: The Sanctuary
highlights.body: Adults-only top-deck retreat with signature cocktails, light meals and al-fresco massages, looked after by Serenity Stewards.

highlights.title: Lotus Spa
highlights.body: Voted "Best Spa on a Cruise Ship" by Spafinder — facials, hot stone massages, an aromatherapy thermal suite and a full salon.

highlights.title: Princess Theater
highlights.body: Lavish original musicals, magicians, comedians and feature films in a plush, unobstructed-sightline theater.

highlights.title: Top-deck pools
highlights.body: Sparkling pools and hot tubs on the lido deck, perfect for sea-day lounging.

dining.name: Main Dining Rooms
dining.note: Traditional, Flexible or Walk-in dining with menus from the executive chefs.

dining.name: Reserve Dining
dining.note: Private area in the main dining room with expedited seating and chef's daily special.

dining.name: International Cafe
dining.note: Open 24/7 in the Piazza — pastries, salads, sandwiches and gourmet coffee.

dining.name: Slice Pizzeria
dining.note: Top-deck pizza, including the award-winning Neapolitan-style signature pie.

dining.name: Coffee & Cones
dining.note: Complimentary ice cream cones, espresso and tea on the top deck.

dining.name: Salty Dog Grill
dining.note: Handmade gourmet burgers in the fresh air.

dining.name: Crown Grill
dining.note: Premium steakhouse with carefully aged cuts and gourmet salts.

dining.name: Sabatini's Italian Trattoria
dining.note: Artisanal Italian dishes celebrating regional traditions.

dining.name: Chef's Table
dining.note: Multi-course tasting dinner hosted by the executive chef.

dining.name: The Crab Shack
dining.note: Lunchtime pop-up in the Horizon Court — clam chowder, popcorn shrimp and a steamer pot.

dining.name: Wheelhouse Bar (Gastropub)
dining.note: Pub favourites and the "Best Burger at Sea" — beer, whiskey, cocktails and live music.

dining.name: Ultimate Balcony Dining
dining.note: Multi-course meal served by waitstaff on your own balcony.

dining.name: Afternoon Tea
dining.note: Finger sandwiches, cakes and fine tea — a daily ritual.

activities: Princess Theater shows — original musicals, magic and comedy
Movies Under the Stars on the top deck
Casino — blackjack, Texas Hold'em, roulette and slots
Live music in Crooners, the Piazza and the piano bar
Club Fusion nightclub and Skywalkers Nightclub dance floor
Lotus Spa fitness centre — yoga, Pilates, TRX, spin
Champagne Art Auctions and gallery walks
Award-winning onboard shopping (Swarovski, Chanel, Estee Lauder, more)
Pools and hot tubs on the lido deck
Top-deck deck parties under the stars

bars.name: Crooners
bars.note: Sinatra-era piano bar with signature martinis.

bars.name: Wheelhouse Bar
bars.note: Classic cocktails, beers and signature drinks.

bars.name: Vines
bars.note: USA TODAY-voted "Best Wine Bar at Sea" in the Piazza.

bars.name: Good Spirits
bars.note: Craft cocktails inspired by destinations on the itinerary.
